resposta:
solution: ```class Solution:
    def reverseWords(self, s: str) -> str:
        return ' '.join(word[::-1] for word in s.split(' '))```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Split the string into words, reverse each word in-place slice, then re-join with single spaces. Single linear pass over the string, minimal extra memory beyond the output.
